Metadata.Title: CVE-2026-44283 affecting package etcd for versions less than 3.5.30-2
Metadata.Description: CVE-2026-44283 affecting package etcd for versions less than 3.5.30-2. An upgraded version of the package is available that resolves this issue.

Criterion.Comment: Package etcd is earlier than 3.5.30-2, affected by CVE-2026-44283
